name: Tech / SaaS
description: Software products, developer tools, B2B platforms

tone_rules.statement: Write clearly and directly — no marketing fluff or vague promises
Use active voice and concrete numbers whenever possible
Explain complex concepts with simple analogies, not jargon
Be confident but not arrogant — let results speak

principles.statement: Lead with the customer's problem, not the product's features
Show don't tell: use case studies, metrics, and real examples
Respect the reader's time — get to the point in the first sentence
Build trust through transparency: share failures and lessons learned

gold_examples.statement: We cut our deployment time from 4 hours to 8 minutes. Here's exactly how.
Most security tools protect you from hackers. Ours protects you from your own team's mistakes.

discard_examples.statement: Our revolutionary AI-powered solution leverages cutting-edge synergies to transform your workflow paradigm.
We're passionate about delivering world-class enterprise solutions that scale!
